heuristics.scenarioLabel: Avoid 9-T-J style starts that are trapped between the high and low halves
heuristics.appliesWhen: Third-street Stud Hi/Lo starts built around Nines, Tens, or many Jacks
heuristics.adjustWhen: Treat these cards as low-disqualified and usually too weak to own the high half by themselves
heuristics.rationale: The source explicitly calls these cards 'no man's land' because they miss both halves of the game too often.

heuristics.scenarioLabel: Ace-plus-wheel starts are premium split-pot starters
heuristics.appliesWhen: Start contains an Ace plus supporting wheel cards, such as A-5 down with 3 up
heuristics.adjustWhen: Value rises when the hand also carries concealed high backup like an Ace or flush potential
heuristics.rationale: The source gives A-5 down with 3 up as a very good example because it can win both halves.

heuristics.scenarioLabel: Do not auto-play every three-to-a-low start; run the checklist first
heuristics.appliesWhen: Holding three to a low on third street in Stud Hi/Lo
heuristics.adjustWhen: Ask how low the draw is
heuristics.rationale: The source explicitly turns this family into a three-question decision process rather than an automatic continue.

heuristics.scenarioLabel: Weak eight-low draws should usually fold when real low competition or dead outs are visible
heuristics.appliesWhen: Weak three-to-a-low hand like 8-6 down with 4 up
heuristics.adjustWhen: Fold more often when low cards such as A, 2, 3, or 5 are showing in other hands
heuristics.rationale: The source gives a concrete weak eight-low example and tells you to pivot based on whether the low side is contested.

heuristics.scenarioLabel: Once you likely own the low half, pressure high-only opponents aggressively
heuristics.appliesWhen: You have a made low and are likely the only qualifying low at showdown
heuristics.adjustWhen: Avoid being the high-only caller against an aggressive made-low player unless you are very sure of the high half
heuristics.rationale: The source repeatedly recommends pushing money in when you are freerolling the low half and others are contesting only the high side.
